eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 12:25 PM on JUN 6, 2026 Effective until 8:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Phoenix Police Department is looking for Patricia Studt, last seen on on foot near North 16th Way and East Union Hills Drive in Phoenix, Arizona

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
